query: What are Hyperliquid HIP-2 spot markets? How many are listed? What is the total volume and TVL in HIP-2 markets? Which tokens are performing best?
source: Hyperliquid public API (api.hyperliquid.xyz/info - spotMetaAndAssetCtxs) + web research
note: HeyZibi API returned 401 (auth required). Data sourced from HL public API and web research instead.

hip2Overview.what_is_hip2: HIP-2 is the Hyperliquid Improvement Proposal that defines native spot liquidity bootstrapping. It creates an automated on-chain AMM seeding mechanism for HIP-1 tokens (tokens deployed on Hyperliquid L1). HIP-2 provides initial liquidity from a deployer-funded reserve, enabling spot trading from day one without requiring external market makers.
hip2Overview.hip1_relationship: HIP-1 defines the token creation standard. Any token minted via HIP-1 can opt into HIP-2 liquidity bootstrapping, which places limit orders across a price curve to seed the orderbook.

marketStats.note: Most markets use @N notation (non-canonical), which resolves to a named HIP-1 token via the token registry. Only PURR/USDC is canonical.

tvlNote: TVL in HIP-2 markets is not directly queryable from public API. Estimated from circulating supply × mark prices. Top tokens by market cap include PURR (~$40M), WOW, NEKO.
keyInsights: 297 total spot pairs listed on Hyperliquid HIP-2
87 active with >$0 24h volume — roughly 29% of all listed markets are actively traded
WOW/USDC dominates with $67.7M of the $105.4M total 24h spot volume (64% concentration)
PURR is the only 'canonical' (officially named) spot market — all others use @N notation
Spot volume of $105.4M is about 5% of the $2.01B perp volume — spot is growing but smaller
